div.p: CAS-based lock-free stack push with retry on contention
✓ CAS returned true ✓ stack->top now points to new_node ✓ Push complete - return immediately
✗ CAS returned false ✗ Another thread modified top first ✗ old_top updated to current value
The successful CAS is the linearization point. At this exact instant, the push "takes effect" and becomes visible to all other threads.
